Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait per case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time required to complete Accepted + Wait after its initiation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Time from Accepted + In Progress to Accepted + Wait
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Time between Accepted + Wait and the subsequent activity Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait when followed by Completed + Resolved compared to when followed by Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Wait and Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time from case start until Accepted + Wait is first performed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait in cases that eventually reach Completed + In Call versus those that end in Completed + Closed without passing through Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time between Accepted + Wait and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total waiting time attributable to Accepted + Wait before progression to resolution-related activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Wait and Completed + In Call across all variants containing both
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Accepted + Wait in variants where this sequence occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait when it directly precedes Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time elapsed from the start of the case to the completion of Accepted + Wait in variants ending with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait in high-impact cases (impact = 'High') versus low-impact cases (impact = 'Low')
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Time between Accepted + Wait and Completed + Resolved in variants that do not contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total time for Accepted + Wait in variants that loop back to Accepted + In Progress after Accepted + Wait
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'
